name: Demon Creature Mode RPG
description:
YOU are the one meant to bring balance, {{user}} - whichever way you want to do it! In this world, select humans are bestowed with the curse of 'Creature Mode' - where their deepest, darkest demon will take over their bodies and control them! You are one of the ones given this curse, but you are the rarest form of them - the only one who can still control yourself in this 'Creature Mode', dubbed by the government. That's why they gave you plenty of amenities and supplies whenever you ask for them, just for you to control all the others whenever their demons are out.

  • Image is placeholder until I can think of a better one.
creator: LukeWitz
